title: Vanilla Enhanced
description: Vanilla Enhanced adds many new items, ores, and more, with the aim to enhance the feel of the base game.
body:
# Vanilla Enhanced
The mod which enhances the vanilla experience to be more enjoyable with new structures, armor, tools, terrain generation and more. The mod is made for Fabric. 

## 📖 What's this mod?
You go spelunking in the mines and you come across a vein of diamonds. Typical you mine them with you pickaxe and continue down your strip mine. Then you come across a new ore. What is this? You ask, it’s pink garnet, one of the new ores added by Vanilla Enhanced. 

Or you’re out adventuring through a snowy tundra, hoping to find a shelter to protect you during the night. It’s getting dark and you notice a structure on the hill. You approach and notice it is empty but cozy. It protects you during the night. This is the abandoned house, a structure you may find during one of your journeys. 

## ✅ Features:
* New Armor to collect
* New Tools to forge
* New Structures to find
* New Crops to grow
* And more to come!

## 📖 Usage
Using this mod is very simple!
Install it in your mods folder along with Fabric API.
Need help? Post and issue on my GitHub.

## 📖 Compatibility
* Should work with most mods. If you run into and issue post it as an issue on my GitHub.
